description: Style NoteBlock the elements and look sporty in this fabulous cap from adidas. The fabric and Clima Lite technology keep your head cool and dry all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers to complete your sporty fashion statement.Product DetailsFabric is engineered with Clima Lite technologyadidas patented 3-Stripes embroidered in orange on the crownCurved visor with the Adidas patented 3-StripeAdjustable back strap Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not tumble dry, use softeners or bleachLine dry
